name: vantage-light
prompt: Wide shot from behind. Young brunette woman seated at viewport, silhouetted against brilliant white-gold light flooding through glass. Vantage station emerging from FTL shadow — massive scale visible, construction frames reaching outward, thousands of ships in formation. The future filling the frame. Cool blue transport interior overwhelmed by warm golden station light. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, epic scale

sfx.description: warm light flooding in, distant station hum growing, hope and future arriving
